label: Illustrative workflow — synthetic data
note: All records below are synthetic fixtures. Timestamps are static strings so the demo is deterministic. No record refers to a real company.

sources.title: Project Alder operating model v12 — P&L, FY2025 revenue

sources.title: Synthetic 10-Q excerpt — condensed income statement
sources.excerpt: Revenue for the trailing twelve months was $48.2 million, an increase of 17.8% over the prior-year period ($40.9 million).

sources.title: Synthetic 10-Q excerpt — MD&A
sources.excerpt: Management expects continued operating leverage as the payments and analytics modules scale, with adjusted EBITDA margin expected to improve modestly through fiscal 2027.

sources.title: Synthetic Q2 FY2025 earnings-call transcript excerpt
sources.excerpt: Our top ten customers together still represent a little over 40% of revenue, and we are working to broaden the mid-market base.

sources.title: Internal model note — leverage assumptions

location.description: Analyst working note; assumption not yet confirmed

sources.excerpt: Base case assumes net leverage of 4.0x at close. Pending lender feedback — not yet confirmed. Do not treat as final.

sources.title: Comparable transactions export (comps.csv)

location.description: Vendor-style CSV export of eight synthetic vertical-software transactions

sources.excerpt: EV/Revenue multiples for the eight listed transactions range from 4.9x to 6.8x.

sources.title: Synthetic Q2 FY2025 earnings-call transcript excerpt — retention
sources.excerpt: Net revenue retention has remained above 108% in each of the last four quarters.
